intro: The technology and cybersecurity sectors were the primary targets of a concentrated wave of incidents documented across 37 reports from mid-April 2026. The threat actor OpenClaw was active during this period, with operations also impacting healthcare, ai-development, and cloud services on a global scale. The archive reflects a severity mix dominated by high and critical alerts, alongside numerous informational updates, detailing a significant focus on vulnerabilities and threats within these interconnected fields.
